name: Forklift accident happened at work but symptoms started weeks later what now?

mainEntity.name: Forklift accident happened at work but symptoms started weeks later what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report delayed symptoms to doctor/employer ASAP; comp covers if causally linked.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, delayed symptoms from work forklift accidents qualify for workers' comp if linked to the incident.** Medical records must connect the delay to the job injury.[3] Key factors: See a doctor immediately upon symptoms, get opinions tying it to the accident, and notify employer promptly. Utah presumes on-premises injuries work-related.[3] Avoid gaps in treatment; document everything for claim approval despite delay.[2]

description: Report delayed symptoms to doctor/employer ASAP; comp covers if causally linked.[3]
